ideation: This animation sequence will depict the robot playfully mimicking the action of driving a pickup truck.  The sequence will focus on the robot's arms, simulating the gripping of a steering wheel and the shifting of gears.  The left arm will primarily simulate the act of steering, and the right arm will simulate the shifting of gears.  The left arm will be more dynamic, while the right arm shows more focused, smaller movements. We'll keep the arm movements expressive and within the robot's physical capabilities, while ensuring the overall animation is clear and understandable.

frames.beat: arms grip the wheel, ready to drive
left arm steers, right arm shifts gears smoothly
left arm turns, right arm shifts down hard
both arms drop, the truck has arrived
